title.rendered: HOW TO DROP A TOOL AS IF IT WAS IN YOUR WORKSPACE - WORKS ON ANY GAMES THAT USE TOOL SYSTEM

content.rendered:
Created by d1mka

Features:

  • DROP TOOLS LIKE THEY IN YOUR WORKSPACE
  •  
  • HOW TO DO THIS:
    • 1. Make sure you put the tool’s name you want to drop in the ToolNames array, this works with multiple tools. The name doesn’t have to be exact or case-sensitive.
    • 2.  Equip a tool in your hand that isn’t any of the tools you want to drop.
    • 3. Execute the script
    • 4. Re-equip the tool you were holding, then your alt or friends can pick up those tools
  • VIDEO EXAMPLE

  •  
  • DEV NOTES:
  • Now in case you don’t know, the GIF Module is notorious for crashing Synapse’s decompiler. If you went into any game with the GIF module in it, and tried decompiling it, it will not work. The decompiler crashes completely. Now of course I don’t know if this is intentional or not, but I have a feeling that whoever worked on this module unintentionally found a method to crash Synapse’s decompiler by adding around 35 indents at the end of the script. Godspeed!

    • 4. Post the image in the Discord server’s #reports section.
    • 5. If the staff asks for video proof, be sure to add that. Pretty easy to fake a video as well with this script.
    • 6. Enjoy getting the victim banned!.

title.rendered: ROBLOX - HOW TO OVERNIGHT AUTO FARM WITHOUT CRASHES, DISCONNECTS ETC!

content.rendered:
Created by TheRealChick

 

STEP 1 - DOWNLOAD

Download Roblox-Account-Manager and extract the zip folder Link: not posting on v3rm too lazy for vt search: “Roblox acc manager GitHub” and click the first, icewolfs
For Idiots: Right click the zip and then press “Extract All”

STEP 2 - ADDING ACCOUNTS

Open the “RBX Alt Manager.exe” and add the accounts you wish to auto farm with, you have to enter your Username and Password. If you do not trust this then I am not able to help because you are most likely extremely mentally challenged

Now most people use “Auto Roblox” for some reason but that’s useless literally the acc manager has all features but in better and Autoroblox requires you to download it LOOOL

STEP 4 - SETTING GAME UP

You have to Select the account/s you want to edit the Settings for, not just tick the box ( has to be blue marked ) - Read the “Help” tab
Enable Auto Relaunch, it will make sure Roblox restarts at every Disconnect, Crash, Freezing etc.

To get any game placeId, join the game and execute:

setclipboard(game.placeId) — replace “setclipboard” with “print” if executor is shit

This copies it to your clipboard ( ctrl + v to paste )

Synapse X
You should enable AutoLaunch ( prevents risk if Synapse UI Crashes ) and close Synapse after.
Then open your exploit auto-execute and download the file located in, Control Panel under the Help tab as it shows below, and place it Inside.

And as last Step enable the auto relaunch and put the scripts and nexus.lua in your AutoExecute ( If every account uses the same script I recommend the Exploit auto-execute, else use the Acc Control one.

title.rendered: ROBLOX INTERNAL TEST PLUGIN - LEAK .RBXM FILE

content.rendered:
Created by netbox

GlobalWind is an internal template plugin for internal use created by developers who work at Roblox Corporation. One time on sitetest2 they added GlobalWind into BuiltInPlugins. It was quickly removed though. However, I was able to archive it.

This is essentially a starter kit for Roblox Internal developers to begin working on both public-facing and also internal plugins such as Developer Storybook and Developer Inspector. This has never been released before to my knowledge, so if you want to play around with internal tools, go ahead.

(YOU WILL NEED ROBLOX STUDIO INTERNAL TO MAKE PLUGINS USING THIS, HOWEVER YOU CAN PATCH THIS YOURSELF USING AUTOMATED SCRIPTS)

 

This comes with the following tools to help get you started:

  • Example internal components used to build plugins in Lua. (actions, components, reducers, etc.)
  • Basic file layout for plugins (source files go in src, other stuff goes in bin, internal packages are in packages)
  • The RIDE (Roblox Internal Developer Environment) Suite. Contains very important packages for development such as Roact, RoactRodux, Rodux, Cryo, Rhodium, TestEZ, and the Framework. Also contains other developer utilities.
  • The DeveloperFramework, THE HOLY BIBLE OF DEVELOPMENT. Contains LOTS of internal bullshit including what Roblox uses internally for data visualization and other stuff like that (Kibana), also exposes tons of hidden APIS to the public eye including a HIDDEN Roblox CLI Service ProcessService.
  • Basically full template of what Roblox engineers use to build apps. Also includes stuff such as comments left by engineers and jira links too, if you’re into that stuff.

Download

title.rendered: Twisted’s Tools - REMOTESPY - SCRIPT DUMPER - ANTI AFK - FUNCTION DUMPER FREE SCRIPTS

content.rendered:
Created by NoTwistedHere#6703

Features:

  • REMOTE SPY
    • Writes to RemoteSpyLogs/ (if enabled)
    • If you wish to spy on InvokeClient calls you’ll most likely need to execute the RemoteSpy before the game loads.
  • SCRIPT DUMPER
  • PRINT TABLE
    • Made to be placed in your autoexec folder
  • ANIT AFK
    • Made to be placed in your autoexec folder
  • FUNCTION DUMPER
    • Made to be placed in your autoexec folder
      • Writes to Garbage Logs/[PlaceId]/
  •  
  •  
  • DEV NOTES:
  • The normal Anti-AFK scripts are also detectable (even Adonis detects it).
  • FunctionDump(er) was made to dump all functions (upvalues, constants, LocalFunctions) in (a) script(s) because we all know Synapse’s decompiler is bad (but fuck me, is v3’s worse).
  • RemoteSpy is undetectable (to my knowledge), has support for :InvokeClient(), custom stack trace so cheeky developers like myself can’t hide the originating script by wrapping FireServer/whatever in a pcall.
  • ScriptDumper was something I was new to, I tried to make it as efficient as possible.

title.rendered: [WARNING] - DO NOT EXPLOIT IN FRONT OF ROBLOX OFFICIAL QA TESTERS

content.rendered:
Created by netbox

Do not exploit in front of Roblox’s official QA testers. If you do, you have a risk of getting HWID banned from Roblox, and I’m not fucking around. Here’s how.

So basically, Roblox’s official QA Testers are just volunteers to test events before they are completely released to the public (eg. for Dubit events or Gamefam events), and these people have direct contact to Roblox’s team, which means if they find you exploiting, they can report you to actual Roblox staff and get you in big trouble FAST.

For example, I exploited in front of a QA Tester and they didn’t say much, but they left when I wasn’t looking. Soon, I got terminated for exploiting. And it wasn’t just a termination, Roblox terminated a bunch of accounts I owned (and also terminated my friends too). Not only that, I got HWID banned from Roblox entirely. Luckily I bypassed with syn but still, don’t risk it. You can get into big ass trouble. Don’t risk it, guys.

title.rendered: UNIVERSAL - Limit FPS When Unfocused Out of Roblox

content.rendered:
Created by ceg#6014
Enjoy.

Features:

  • LIMITS FPS WHEN UNFOCUSED OUT OF ROBLOX
    • This small script helps you keep Roblox in the background while using much less computational resources than usual.
  •  
  • DEV NOTES:
  • When unfocused out of Roblox’s window it disables 3D rendering and caps FPS as you don’t need them if your multi tasking. Once you refocus back onto Roblox, it uncaps your FPS and enables 3D rendering.
  • Tested on Synapse with Fps Unlocked setting on (CRUCIAL SETTING TO MAKE SCRIPT WORK).
  • All scripts like auto farm should continue to work but slower (don’t know if it truly slow your auto farm but yeah).
  • For the best result, you should put this in auto exec for general usage

title.rendered: Starscape AUTO PILOT SCRIPT - SYNAPSE X ONLY

content.rendered:
Created by Caedus

Enjoy.

Features:

  • AUTO PILOT
  •  
  • DEV NOTES:
  • This is an autopilot script for the roblox game Starscape, which is basically a mini Eve Online. Starscape is a much more solid Roblox space game than Galaxy, imo. I love it.
  • Unlike in Eve, Starscape doesn’t have an auto pilot feature, which is quite annoying given the long distance interstellar travel times in this game, (it has several thousand star systems). So I decided to make an autopilot for this game to make life easier, and in hopes that this may cause the developer to eventually consider adding a native autopilot to the game.
  • Pressing f1 will toggle the autopilot on/off. Set a destination first with the in-game map.
  • This script is essentially a smart macro. As such, unfortunately your roblox window must stay focused for it to work. But here you go! 

Please note that this script is only compatible with SynapseX, as it utilizes Synapse’s in-built input functions to basically AI the in-game warping GUI. 

Download

  • 3. Once you have the image rotated, flipped, converted to 32×32, and it’s inside of your workspace folder then we can run the script.
  • 4. ENSURE YOU ARE SITTING AT YOUR BOOTH OR IT WONT WORK!

title.rendered: Pet Simulator X DUPE SCRIPT -

content.rendered:
Created by KonteBonker

Features:

  • DUPE SCRIPT
  •  
  • HOW TO USE:
  • 1. Do autoclicker on execute with this for 8 minutes.
  • 2. Then join with your alt and stop executing.
  • 3. Stay afk with your alt and your main for 3 minutes long.
  • 4. Rejoin the private server with your main.
  • 5. If you have an error then click OK.
  • 6. Then you will go rejoin to a different server and then the only things you have to do is deposit everything you wanna dupe (gems has higher chance of working).
  • 7. Then leave the server and join the private server. If the error popups again then the dupe worked and click OK again and redo the last few parts with depositing.
  • 8. If the error doesnt show up then do it again.
    • Place bankid in local bankid = “bankidhere”
  •  
  • DEV NOTES:
  • I saw people selling this free stuff in discords.
  • There are plenty of better and optimized scripts of this that work like 1 minute faster or sum but you can do that yourself.
  • + its not a 100% dupe. I’ve found that or you get lucky and it will work 8 times a row. Or you wont and you try doing it 10 times and 0 ones succes.
  • I most of the time have 50/50.

title.rendered: Starving Artist USE ANY IMAGE AS ARTWORK - PYTHON

content.rendered:
Created by duck#1337

Features:

  • USE ANY IMAGE AS ARTWORK
  •  
  • DEV NOTES:
  • THIS IS NOT ALWAYS GOING TO WORK, INFACT IT FUCKING BREAKS A LOT AND ITS ANNOYING IM NOT GOING TO FIX IT, BUT I GOT 2 PICTURES OF GEORGE FLOYD ON THERE.
  • MAKE SURE THE ART NAME ISN’T FILTERED IM PRETTY SURE THAT WAS ACTUALLY THE RAESON I COULDN’T GET SOME TO WORK!!
  • MAKE SURE YOU SIT IN YOUR ART CHAIR BEFORE TRYING TO SAVE SOMETHING
  •  
  • For anyone who *DOESN’T* have python installed: go to its website, download it, make sure you check a box called “Add Python Path to Environment Variables” on the installer
  • Ok now after that, go to command prompt and type py -m pip install pyperclip pillow
  • Now everything should be ready, go to where the python file is located, and put the image you want to convert there. Change the FILE_NAME at the very top the file in your directory, then run it.
  • It will set something to your clipboard, now join the game and paste this into ur executor and edit the variables at the top, and that’s it
